title: PigGadgets
description: The coolest - pigg'iest plugin for gadgets
body:
# Description
This plugin make a cool and funny gadgets on the server.
# How Change the names?
go to plugin directory: home/femboypig/plugins/PigGadget/lang/ru.yml and en.yml, **DO NOT DELETE FILES, PLUGIN AUTO LOCALIZATION LANGUAGE FOR PLAYER (EN AND RU)**
# Commands
**/piggadget** - gives you the "gadgetitem name" item.
**/gadgets** - Gadgets menu
# Permissions
**piggadget.givegadget** - for /piggadget command.
**piggadget.menugadget** - for /gadgets command
# Dependency
WorldEdit
# Gadgets and description:
**Ender Pearl** - when you throw a pearl, you sit on it and fly with it
**Random Firework** - on use - random fireworks effect appears
**Snowball** - when using a snowball and when it falls to the ground, players within a radius of 3 blocks are thrown up
**ColorStick** - on right click on air, appears a random Concrete block color
**Tor, or Tor Axe** - on right or left click the axe causes lightning
**Fatcow** - on use this spawner, 5 cows with the name fat cow appear
**Saddle** - on right click on player, you sit on his head
**Pig boost** - pig boost))
**Fishing road** - the default fishing road
**Color Gun** - on right / left click on block, block and blocks in radius 5 blocks, change to random color concrete
# Soon Changelog
1. new gadgets
# Where you can contact with me?
In my [discord server](https://discord.gg/CT5QwhPXzA)
